titleStmt.title: SII 36.235: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 235. (A.R. No. 235 of 1910.) IḶAMBAYAṄGŌṬṬŪR, SRIPERUMBUDUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north base of the temple of Dēvanāyakasvāmi.

summary.p: Gift of one māḍai for a twilight lamp (chandhi viḷakku) to the temple of Tiruviḷambamkōṭṭur-uḍaiya Nāyanar at Kōṭṭur alias Chōḻavichchādirachchaturvēdimaṅgalam in Kaṉṟūr-nāḍu, a subdivision of Maṉaviṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam by Śrī Āḍavallār, the daughter of Takkanāchchi, a dēvaraḍiyār in the temple. The śiva-brāhmaṇas of the temple who received the money undertook to maintain the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ maturai koṇṭu pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalai koṇṭu vīrāapiṣekamum vicaiyāapiṣekamum paṇṇiaruḷiya tripuvaṉavīradevaṟkku yāṇṭu muppattu nālāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu maṇaviṟ koṭṭattuk kaṉṟūr nā(ā)
ṭṭu koṭṭūrāṉa coḷa coḻaviccātirac caturveti maṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruvilampamkoṭṭūruṭaiya nāyaṉār koyiṟ civappirāmaṇaromik koyiṟ tevaraṭiyāril takkanācci makaḷ śrīāṭavallar vaiytta cantiviḷakku Oṉṟukku kaik ko
ṇṭa māṭai Oṉṟum kaikkoṇṭu Oru canti Eḻarai nāḻikai tiruviḷakku Erikka kaṭavomākac cammatittuk kaikkoṇṭom Ikkoyil civappirāmaṇarom Itu śrī maāheśvara rakṣaiḥ
Digital edition of SII 36.235 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
